info.description: This is Aurora Back Office API.
info.title: Aurora Back Office API

get.description: Returns the owner information for a specific bucket
Returns environment configuration for the backoffice web application, including Auth0 settings
Returns details of the authenticated partner
Returns a paginated list of all partners
Returns details of a specific partner by ID
Returns the configuration for the partner

put.description: Updates the configuration for the partner

get.description: Returns a list of regions for the partner
Returns details of a specific region by ID
Returns a paginated list of tenants for the partner

post.description: Creates a new tenant for the partner. Created tenant must be initialized with the Setup endpoint before it's ready to use.

get.description: Returns details of a specific tenant by ID
Returns users that are members of given org

post.description: Initiates the setup process for a tenant
Updates the status of a tenant

get.description: Returns a list of themes for the partner

post.description: Creates a new Aurora Portal theme for the partner

409.description: Theme with this name already exists

get.description: Returns details of a specific theme by ID

put.description: Updates an Aurora Portal theme for the partner

409.description: Another theme with this name already exists

get.description: Returns a paginated list of users for the partner

post.description: Creates a new user and assigns them to a tenant. If a user with provided email already exists, creation will be skipped and that user will be assigned to a tenant.

get.description: Returns details of a specific user including tenants and roles
Returns a list of all regions (bypasses partner scoping)
Returns a paginated list of all Aurora Portal roles
Returns a paginated list of all S3 credentials
Returns details of a specific S3 credential by ID

500.description: Failed to get s3 credential info

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all warm tier credentials
Returns details of a specific warm tier credential by ID

500.description: Failed to get warm tier credential info
